title: agropyron repens var. dumetorum
intro: Agropyron repens var. dumetorum, also known as couch grass, is a type of grass that is native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Agropyron repens var. dumetorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural diuretic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
